title: indocalamus tessellatus
intro: Indocalamus tessellatus, also known as the Tessellated bamboo or Black stem bamboo, is a type of bamboo plant native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Indocalamus tessellatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and improving digestion. Indocalamus tessellatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and ointments.
